name: deckbuilder-desktop
description: Desktop deck-builder for the Four Souls card game

scripts.dev:preflight: bash -lc 'for p in 4200 5001; do pids=$(lsof -t -i :$p || true); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then echo "Killing stale process(es) on port $p: $pids"; kill $pids || true; fi; done'
scripts.dev:backend: bash -lc 'VENV_PY="$(cd .. && pwd)/.venv/bin/python"; if [ -x "$VENV_PY" ]; then "$VENV_PY" backend/app.py; else python3 backend/app.py; fi'
scripts.dev:web: npm run dev:preflight && concurrently -k "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.dev:electron: npm run dev:preflight && concurrently -k "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron:attach"
scripts.pack: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && electron-builder
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --mac
